/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard.dir/src/ecm.c.o CMakeFiles/FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard.dir/src/ekf.c.o CMakeFiles/FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard.dir/src/arrhenius.c.o CMakeFiles/FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard.dir/src/controller.c.o -o FPV_LiPo_Thermal_Runaway_Guard  -lm
